purpose: Comprehensive troubleshooting guide for Synapse errors and failure modes. Covers dependency graph validation errors (self-reference, dangling, circular, orphan), progress file validation errors (task_id/dashboard_id mismatch, missing fields, invalid status/stage/timestamps), dashboard isolation violations, initialization schema errors (task.name format, type, count mismatches, agent IDs, immutability), circuit breaker triggers, JSON/file I/O issues, path confusion (tracker_root vs project_root), worker context exhaustion, stale ghost agents, and shared file conflicts. Each entry includes exact error message, cause, and fix.
gotchas: task_id field must EXACTLY match filename (without .json) -- hard rejection
dashboard_id must match dashboard directory name -- hard rejection
Master cannot write to {project_root} during active swarm (validate-master-write hook)
Dashboard files MUST be under {tracker_root}/dashboards/ -- enforced by hook
task.name is write-once after planning (immutable except for repair/replan/!add_task)
Hooks fail open by default -- if jq missing or script errors, tool call allowed
SYNAPSE_SKIP_SCHEMA=1 bypass available only for validate-initialization-schema.sh
completed_at must be null when status is in_progress
patterns: Validation via Kahn's topological sort algorithm in src/server/utils/validation.js
Two-tier validation: hooks (block) + watcher service (broadcast filter)
Hard rejection vs warning distinction (REJECTED prefix vs Warning)
Circuit breaker thresholds: 3+ wave failures OR blast radius > 50%
conventions: Agent IDs: '{wave}.{index}' format, repair tasks use 'r' suffix
Status values: in_progress, completed, failed (exact strings)
Atomic writes via tmp-then-rename to avoid partial reads
